title: Auto Populating column numbers
excerpt:
Is there a feature where I can auto populate a number in a column? For example, I have 30 items and in one column I need the number 2 in all of them. 
Do I have to go through all 30 and add it manually or is there someth…

posts.author: danielle0127 (danielle hernandez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a feature where I can auto populate a number in a column? For example, I have 30 items and in one column I need the number 2 in all of them.
Do I have to go through all 30 and add it manually or is there something faster?

Thank you

posts.author: andrewalmand (Andrew Almand)
posts.cookedHtml:
@danielle0127

Two ways to accomplish this:

Item Default Values

Look for it at the top of your board under the name/description.

image763×205 13 KB

-OR-

Custom Automation

This way gives you some more flexibility on which items get the number. For example you can set it to only items created in a certain group, have a certain status etc.

image704×92 6.42 KB

posts.author: danielle0127 (danielle hernandez)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, this was perfect
